zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Randes於1455年出生在英國艾可時，她的父親Sir John Randes26歲，母親Agnes Brewse24歲。她於1486年4月18日與Sir William Yelverton II在英國諾福爾可盧加姆結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1491年4月18日在英國諾福爾可盧加姆享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Randes于1455年出生在英国艾可时，她的父亲Sir John Randes26岁，母亲Agnes Brewse24岁。她于1486年4月18日与Sir William Yelverton II在英国諾福爾可盧加姆结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1491年4月18日在英国諾福爾可盧加姆享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: Randes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Pedro, Armando, Joaquin, Jose Inez, Tomasa.

variants.name: Mendes
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Mario, Pedro, Alberto, Sergio, Armando, Cesar, Domingos, Francisco, Luis.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Paulo, Agostinho, Amadeu, Armanda, Guilherme, Henrique, Sebastiao, Valentim.
Portuguese and Galician: patronymic from the personal name Mendo, a shortened form of Menendo (see Menendez ).

Jewish (Sephardic): adoption of the Iberian surname (see 1 above) at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some descendants retained the name their families used as Catholics.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Randes was born in 1455, in Essex, England, her father, Sir John Randes, was 26 and her mother, Agnes Brewse, was 24. She married Sir William Yelverton II on 18 April 1486, in Rougham, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 18 April 1491, in Rougham, Norfolk, England, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Randes est née en 1455, à Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Randes, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Agnes Brewse, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Yelverton II le 18 avril 1486, à Rougham, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 avril 1491, à Rougham, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Randes 1455 in Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Randes 26 und ihre Mutter Agnes Brewse 24. Sie hat am 18. April 1486 in Rougham, Norfolk, England Sir William Yelverton II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. April 1491 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Rougham, Norfolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Randes è nata il nel 1455 nel Essex, England, sua padre, Sir John Randes, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Agnes Brewse, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Yelverton II il 18 aprile 1486, nel Rougham, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 18 aprile 1491, nel Rougham, Norfolk, England, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Randesが1455年にイギリスエセックスで生まれた時，父Sir John Randesは26歳，母Agnes Brewseは24歳であった。1486年4月18日にイギリスノーフォルクロウアムでSir William Yelverton IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1491年4月18日にイギリスノーフォルクロウアムで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Randes(이)가 1455년 영국 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Randes(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Brewse(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1486년 4월 18일 영국 노르폴크 루그함에서 Sir William Yelverton II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1491년 4월 18일 영국 노르폴크 루그함에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Randes nasceu em 1455, em Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Randes, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Brewse, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Yelverton II em 18 de abril de 1486, em Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 18 de abril de 1491, em Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Randes родилась в 1455 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Randes было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Brewse, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Yelverton II 18 апреля 1486 г. в местности роугам, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 18 апреля 1491 г. в местности роугам, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Randes nació en 1455, en Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Randes, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Agnes Brewse, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Sir William Yelverton II el 18 de abril de 1486, en Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 18 de abril de 1491, en Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 36 años.
